name: Genasys Inc.
summary: Genasys Inc. (GNSS) is a company that develops and sells critical communications systems and software. The company provides mass notification, emergency communications, and acoustic hailing solutions. Its products include the LRAD (Long Range Acoustic Device) hardware systems and Genasys software platforms used for public safety, emergency management, and defense applications.
